title: GenAI Team Tracker Website
description: The request is to build a team tracker website utilizing Generative AI technologies.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: GenAI Team Tracker Website (DEM-2026-0072)

Executive Summary
This project proposes developing a GenAI Team Tracker Website to revolutionize workforce management by providing dynamic, AI-powered insights into team activities and progress.

Direct Business Value/Impact
This will significantly improve operational efficiency, optimize resource allocation, and enable data-driven decision-making, leading to substantial operational improvements and strategic advantages.

Potential Risk Mitigation
Given the high risk, mitigation includes a phased development approach, robust data governance, and expert AI ethics consultation to manage complexities effectively.
capacity_reasoning: High-risk demand requires Senior Architect oversight.
Delivery team has 90% overall available capacity.
Constraint: Security Engineer has only 0 units available (requires 10).
Skill gap: Required skills Generative AI, API Development, Database Management, System Design, Cloud Deployment, Security Principles, Testing & QA are missing in the available workforce.
Earliest available start date is deferred by 30 days to 2026-08-09.
